languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

languages.text: "Благодарю, генетор, но нет. Прошлое не избыть алхимическими снадобьями и имплантами. Оно всегда будет с нами".
"Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю, генетор, но нет. Прошлое не избыть алхимическими снадобьями и имплантами. Оно всегда будет с нами".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."
"Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."
"Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

languages.text: «Gracias, genetor, pero no. No se puede huir del pasado con elixires alquímicos e implantes. Siempre nos acompaña».
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias, genetor, pero no. No se puede huir del pasado con elixires alquímicos e implantes. Siempre nos acompaña».

languages.text: 「ありがたいお申し出ですが、ゲネター、ご遠慮申し上げます。過去というものは、錬金術の霊薬やインプラントで振り切れるものではありません。それは常に我々と共にあり続けるのです」
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

traits.locale_text: 「ありがたいお申し出ですが、ゲネター、ご遠慮申し上げます。過去というものは、錬金術の霊薬やインプラントで振り切れるものではありません。それは常に我々と共にあり続けるのです」

languages.text: “谢谢你，基因士，但不必了。靠炼金药剂和植入物是躲不掉过去的。它永远都会与我们同在。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

traits.locale_text: “谢谢你，基因士，但不必了。靠炼金药剂和植入物是躲不掉过去的。它永远都会与我们同在。”

languages.text: "Danke, Genetor, aber nein. Der Vergangenheit kann nicht mit alchemistischen Elixieren und Implantaten begegnet werden. Sie wird immer bei uns sein."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, Genetor, aber nein. Der Vergangenheit kann nicht mit alchemistischen Elixieren und Implantaten begegnet werden. Sie wird immer bei uns sein."

"Schön, dass Ihr zurück seid, Kollege. Der Mangel an feurigen Debatten hat meinen Verstand stumpf werden lassen und meine Seele aufgewühlt Auf Nuncius' ausdrücklichen Wunsch rate ich Euch überdies, Eure Wundversorgung möglichst weit weg von den bionischen Werkbänken vorzunehmen."

languages.text: « Je vous remercie, genetor, mais non. On ne peut effacer le passé avec des élixirs et des implants. Nous le portons toujours en nous. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous remercie, genetor, mais non. On ne peut effacer le passé avec des élixirs et des implants. Nous le portons toujours en nous. »

languages.text: "Teşekkür ederim Genetör ama hayır. Simyasal iksirlerle ve implantlarla geçmişten kaçılamaz. O her zaman bizimle olacak."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor, but no. The past cannot be outrun with alchemical elixirs and implants. It will always be with us."

traits.locale_text: "Teşekkür ederim Genetör ama hayır. Simyasal iksirlerle ve implantlarla geçmişten kaçılamaz. O her zaman bizimle olacak."
